subcodes.first_line: Rejoice that the All-Bountiful remembereth thee from His glorious station and calleth thee unto God, the Lord of the worlds. We counsel thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان افرح بما یذکرک الکریم من مقامه العظیم و یدعوک الی الله رب العالمین انا نوصیک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @empty learning; false spirituality, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @wisdom [hikmat]
